description: Non-profit 501(c)(3) charitable organization with EIN provided and governance documents reviewed during onboarding
parsed_text:
KYC / CDD FORM — NON-PROFIT ORGANIZATION
Organization Name: Bright Futures Community Fund
Customer Type: Business (Non-Profit 501(c)(3))
EIN: XX-XXX3309
IRS Tax-Exempt Status: 501(c)(3) — Charitable Organization
IRS Determination Letter Date: 2011-06-22
State Registration: Minnesota Attorney General Charitable Trust Registration No. MN-CT-XXXX7722
Principal Address: 720 Nicollet Mall, Suite 400, Minneapolis, MN 55402, USA
Phone: (612) 555-0148   Email: grants@brightfutures.example
Primary Activity / Mission: Providing educational scholarships and after-school programming for underserved youth in the Twin Cities metro area.
Source of Funds: Foundation grants, individual donations, government contracts (Title I), fundraising events
Expected Monthly Activity: $185,000

GOVERNANCE DOCUMENTS REVIEWED
- IRS Form 990 (2023): Reviewed — total revenue $2.1M, program service expenses 78% of total expenditures.
- Articles of Incorporation: On file, filed with Minnesota Secretary of State 2011-04-10.
- Bylaws: Reviewed — board of directors structure confirmed, term limits present.
- Board Resolution authorizing account opening: Signed by Board Chair Leon Ashford, dated 2025-10-28.

CONTROL PERSON
Name: Sofia Reyes-Morales   Title: Executive Director
DOB: 1979-05-11   SSN: XXX-XX-8872
ID Type: Driver License   ID Number: DL-MN-XX4431   Expiration: 2027-08-15

BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP
Non-profit organizations have no equity owners. Per policy, beneficial ownership form is not applicable. Control person (Executive Director) identified and verified.

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
IRS Tax-Exempt Status Verification: Confirmed via IRS Tax-Exempt Organization Search — active.
Adverse Media: No adverse media found.
PEP Status: Sofia Reyes-Morales — no PEP flag.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
High-Risk Factors: None. Domestic non-profit, fully documented charitable purpose, IRS compliance confirmed.
Risk Rating: Low
CDD Level: Standard
Review Date: 2025-11-07   Reviewer: Hannah Birch
